coreServiceUrls.label: Crypto Asset Reporting
coreServiceUrls.summary: 为高净值加密资产持有人、顾问和家族办公室式运营方整理交易所、钱包、DeFi、OTC 和衍生品记录，建立私有月度报告、对账和风险复核工作流。

coreServiceUrls.label: TradingView Webhook automation
coreServiceUrls.summary: 已有 TradingView Alert 或 Pine Script？将 Webhook 接入交易所或券商 API，包含签名校验、防重复下单、仓位风控、日志告警、源码与私有部署。不卖策略，不承诺收益。

coreServiceUrls.label: Exchange API trading bot development
coreServiceUrls.summary: 交易所 API 自动交易系统开发，覆盖订单路由、DCA/Grid 执行、仓位控制、异常重试、日志告警和源码交付。

coreServiceUrls.label: Broker API automation
coreServiceUrls.summary: Broker API automation overview for IBKR, Schwab, Alpaca, FIX, REST, WebSocket order execution, risk checks, logs, and private deployment.

coreServiceUrls.label: IBKR API automation
coreServiceUrls.summary: IBKR API 自动交易系统开发，面向 Interactive Brokers 工作流，覆盖 TWS Gateway、订单路由、持仓同步、风控和日志审计。

coreServiceUrls.label: Schwab API automation
coreServiceUrls.summary: Schwab API 自动化系统开发，覆盖账户授权、订单流程、组合数据、风控限制、日志审计和私有化部署。

coreServiceUrls.label: Alpaca API automation
coreServiceUrls.summary: Alpaca API 自动交易系统开发，覆盖 REST/WebSocket 接入、订单状态同步、风控校验、日志告警和私有化部署。

coreServiceUrls.label: FIX API order routing
coreServiceUrls.summary: FIX API 订单路由系统开发，覆盖会话管理、订单消息、执行回报、风控校验、日志审计和私有化部署。

coreServiceUrls.label: Custom Trading Software for Teams
coreServiceUrls.summary: Build custom trading software around documented execution rules, existing signals and team workflows, with source code, risk controls and private deployment.

coreServiceUrls.label: TradingView Alert Automation Service
coreServiceUrls.summary: Turn existing TradingView alerts into controlled broker or exchange execution with duplicate prevention, risk checks, logs and private deployment.

coreServiceUrls.label: IBKR Trading Automation Service
coreServiceUrls.summary: Automate a defined IBKR trading or portfolio workflow with order routing, position sync, risk checks, execution reports and private deployment.

coreServiceUrls.label: FIX Order Routing System Development
coreServiceUrls.summary: Build a FIX order routing system around an approved counterparty connection, with order-state control, execution reports, recovery, audit logs and UAT support.

coreServiceUrls.label: Trading risk engine development
coreServiceUrls.summary: 自动交易风控引擎开发，覆盖仓位限制、价格保护、只减仓、限频、权限控制、异常告警和审计日志。

coreServiceUrls.label: Private deployment
coreServiceUrls.summary: 自动交易系统私有化部署服务，覆盖源码交付、VPS/Docker 部署、配置密钥、日志告警、备份和运行文档。

coreServiceUrls.label: Custom Hyperliquid trading bot development
coreServiceUrls.summary: Hire a developer to turn defined trading rules into a custom Hyperliquid bot. Planning starts around USD 5,000 for execution, controls, monitoring, source code and private deployment.

coreServiceUrls.label: TradingView to Hyperliquid automation
coreServiceUrls.summary: Connect existing TradingView alerts to Hyperliquid. Scoped projects start around USD 2,000 for webhook validation, duplicate protection, risk checks, alerts and source delivery.

coreServiceUrls.label: Hyperliquid execution systems for trading teams
coreServiceUrls.summary: Commission a customer-controlled Hyperliquid execution system for a trading firm, treasury or product team. Projects usually start at USD 10,000 for shared controls, audit logs and private deployment.

externalTrustLinks.label: GitHub profile
externalTrustLinks.summary: 公开 GitHub 资料，用于连接站点品牌、工程资料和源码交付能力。

externalTrustLinks.label: Engineering notes
externalTrustLinks.summary: 脱敏工程资料仓库，包含 Webhook 去重/风控 dry-run demo、权限安全建议、平台接入笔记和验收清单。

externalTrustLinks.label: LinkedIn profile
externalTrustLinks.summary: LinkedIn 公开资料，用于保持站外实体信息、服务边界和联系方式一致。

articleUrls.label: TradingView Webhook 如何防重复下单
articleUrls.summary: TradingView Webhook 防重复下单需要稳定 event_id、时间窗口、冷却规则、幂等订单路由、风控拒绝日志和上线前回放测试。

articleUrls.label: IBKR TWS Gateway 和 Client Portal 怎么选
articleUrls.summary: IBKR 接入选择应先确认账户权限、订单类型、会话稳定性、运行环境、数据订阅、错误处理和灰度验收，而不是按接口名称直接决定。

articleUrls.label: 自动交易系统上线前的风控验收清单
articleUrls.summary: 自动交易系统上线前应逐项验证 API Key 权限、暂停开关、最大仓位、重复信号、拒单日志、告警、回滚和灰度运行流程。

articleUrls.label: FIX API 订单回报和审计日志设计
articleUrls.summary: FIX API 订单路由应同时保存原始 FIX 消息和标准化状态，重点验收 ExecutionReport、Reject、序号恢复、断线重连、审计日志和 UAT 回放。

articleUrls.label: How We Prevent Duplicate TradingView Webhook Orders
articleUrls.summary: Preventing duplicate TradingView webhook orders requires stable event IDs, strategy-symbol-action grouping, cooldown windows, idempotent order routing, risk reject logs and replay tests.

articleUrls.label: IBKR TWS Gateway vs Client Portal for Automated Trading
articleUrls.summary: IBKR TWS Gateway and Client Portal should be compared by session stability, account permissions, order types, market data, deployment model, error handling and acceptance tests.

articleUrls.label: TradingView Webhook Strategy Automation
articleUrls.summary: TradingView webhook strategy automation should turn alerts into explicit order intents with event IDs, cooldowns, risk checks, broker routing, logs and replayable acceptance tests.

articleUrls.label: IBKR API Strategy Execution
articleUrls.summary: IBKR API strategy execution should start with account permissions and acceptance tests, then add order routing, position sync, risk limits, reject handling, logs and staged rollout.

articleUrls.label: FIX API Order Routing for Automated Strategies
articleUrls.summary: FIX API order routing for automated strategies needs session management, message mapping, ExecutionReport handling, raw message archives, normalized order state and UAT evidence.

articleUrls.label: Automated Trading Strategy Risk Checklist
articleUrls.summary: An automated trading strategy risk checklist should validate API permissions, manual pause, max position, duplicate signals, market hours, alerts, rollback and operator handoff.

articleUrls.label: Common Automated Trading Strategy Failure Points
articleUrls.summary: Common automated trading strategy failure points include duplicate signals, repainting, stale position state, API rejects, reconnect gaps, partial fills, missing pause controls and weak audit logs.

articleUrls.label: TradingView Alert Payload Template
articleUrls.summary: A useful TradingView alert payload template includes strategy, version, symbol, action, size model, signal time, event ID inputs, shared secret, risk profile and audit fields.

articleUrls.label: API Key Permission Safety for Trading Bots
articleUrls.summary: Trading bot API keys should use minimum permissions: read access for evaluation, scoped trade access for execution, no withdrawal or transfer permission, IP limits where available and documented rotation steps.

articleUrls.label: Alpaca API Paper to Live Checklist
articleUrls.summary: An Alpaca API paper-to-live checklist should verify key separation, base URLs, data permissions, order types, market hours, order status streams, risk limits, logs and manual pause behavior.

articleUrls.label: Schwab Trader API OAuth Automation Checklist
articleUrls.summary: A Schwab Trader API automation checklist should confirm OAuth scopes, token refresh, account visibility, order capability, reject handling, logs, reauthorization and operator ownership.

articleUrls.label: FIX API UAT Checklist Before Production
articleUrls.summary: A FIX API UAT checklist should validate Logon, Heartbeat, NewOrderSingle, Cancel, ExecutionReport, Reject, disconnect recovery, sequence behavior, raw message logs and operator pause.

articleUrls.label: Trading Bot Private Deployment Runbook
articleUrls.summary: A trading bot private deployment runbook should document VPS or cloud ownership, Docker or process setup, environment variables, logs, health checks, alerts, pause controls, backup and rollback.

articleUrls.label: Crypto Asset Reporting Reconciliation Checklist
articleUrls.summary: A crypto asset reporting reconciliation checklist should identify wallets, exchange exports, read-only data sources, balance snapshots, transaction evidence, exception queues and report handover boundaries.

articleUrls.label: Hire a Trading API Developer: Scope Checklist
articleUrls.summary: Before hiring a trading API developer, define the signal source, target broker or exchange API, permission state, order flow, risk controls, logs, deployment target, budget tier and acceptance owner.

articleUrls.label: TradingView Webhook to IBKR Order Workflow
articleUrls.summary: A TradingView webhook to IBKR order workflow should define payload fields, IBKR connection mode, account permissions, order preview, risk gates, duplicate handling and audit logs.

articleUrls.label: Binance API Trading Bot Risk Checklist
articleUrls.summary: A Binance API trading bot risk checklist should review API key permissions, product scope, rate limits, order filters, position limits, idempotency, logs, alerts and key rotation.

articleUrls.label: Broker API Order Reconciliation Checklist
articleUrls.summary: Broker API order reconciliation should connect signals, order intents, broker order IDs, fills, cancels, rejects, positions, exception queues and exportable audit logs.

articleUrls.label: Alpaca WebSocket Order Status Reconciliation
articleUrls.summary: Alpaca WebSocket order status reconciliation should combine streaming updates, REST backfill, stable order IDs, reconnect handling, partial-fill states, exception queues and audit logs.

articleUrls.label: Schwab API Token Refresh Runbook
articleUrls.summary: A Schwab API token refresh runbook should document OAuth ownership, token storage, expiry alerts, refresh failure handling, reauthorization, pause behavior and credential rotation.

articleUrls.label: FIX API Certificate and Network Allowlist Checklist
articleUrls.summary: A FIX API certificate and network allowlist checklist should confirm certificate ownership, source IPs, ports, SenderCompID, TargetCompID, firewall rules, UAT evidence and support handover.

articleUrls.label: Hyperliquid API Order Reconciliation and WebSocket Checklist
articleUrls.summary: Hyperliquid API reliability requires deterministic cloid values, one nonce owner, normalized order states, WebSocket snapshot recovery, info-endpoint backfill, position reconciliation, alerts and fail-closed restart rules.
